title: polypodium interjectum
intro: Polypodium interjectum is a species of fern native to Europe and North Africa, belonging to the genus Polypodium and family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Polypodium interjectum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and support wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves, which can be dried, powdered, and used in teas, infusions, or capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
